title: Candy Castle Mutations Splash Dipper, Fruit Flavoured Lollipops with Sour Dipping Powder, 12-Pack, Hard Candy
features: PACK CONTENTS: 12 fruit-flavoured lollipops with sour dipping powder, perfect for sweet and sour candy lovers
FLAVOUR VARIETY: Multiple vibrant colours including blue, green, red and white, each offering a unique fruity taste experience
TEXTURE COMBINATION: Hard candy lollipop with a firm, pencil-shaped structure complemented by powdered sour coating
STORAGE: Ambient temperature storage required, comes in a convenient hanging bag display packaging
INGREDIENTS: Made with sugar, glucose syrup, fruit juice concentrates, and natural flavourings for a delightful candy experience
description: Product description Dive into a world of sweet and sour excitement with Candy Castle Mutations' Splash Dipper lollipops! Each pack contains 12 delightful fruit-flavoured hard candy lollipops, complete with tangy sour dipping powder for an extra burst of flavour. These pencil-shaped treats come in vibrant colours including blue, green, and red, presented in a convenient hanging bag display. Perfect for sweet shops, party bags, or as a fun treat, these lollipops combine the classic enjoyment of hard candy with an interactive dipping experience. Made in the UK with quality ingredients including fruit and vegetable juice concentrates, these firm lollipops are designed to be stored at room temperature. The 140-gram serving size makes them ideal for sharing or saving for later. Each lollipop features a unique combination of sweet and sour tastes that will make your taste buds tingle with delight. Suitable for anyone who enjoys innovative candy experiences and loves the thrill of sour sweets! Ingredients Sugar, Glucose Syrup, WHEAT Flour, Maize Starch, Fruit and Vegetable Juice Concentrates 1.5%(Apple, Black Carrot), Acidity Regulators (Citric Acid, Malic Acid), Palm Oil, Flavouring, Emulsifier (Mono and Di-glycerides of Fatty Acids).
